about.metaDescription: Learn what Bridgeee does and the scope of the service.
about.pageDescription: Bridgeee helps students connect with mentors for informational support and structured mentoring sessions.
about.notJobService: Bridgeee is not a job placement or recruitment service. It provides informational mentoring only

mentorRegistration.accountRequiredDescription: An account is required to register as a mentor.

about.title: About
about.description: Start creating your public mentor profile. Your progress will be automatically saved as you complete each section.
about.expertise: Expertise / Topics you can help with
about.languages: Languages you can conduct sessions in

photo.title: Profile photo
photo.description: Choose a photo that will help learners get to know you.
photo.fileSizeLimit: File size must be less than 5MB

education.title: Education
education.description: Tell students more about the higher education that you've completed or are working on
education.optional: This step is optional. You can skip and add this information later from your profile settings.
education.noDegree: I don't have a higher education degree
education.degreePlaceholder: E.g. Bachelor's degree in the English Language
education.specializationPlaceholder: E.g. Teaching English as a Foreign Language

description.title: Profile description
description.description: This info will go on your public profile. Write it in the language you'll be teaching and make sure to follow our guidelines to get approved.
description.introduceDescription: Show potential students who you are! Share your teaching experience and passion for education and briefly mention your interests and hobbies.
description.introduceWarning: Don't include your last name or present your information in a CV format
description.workDescription: Describe your relevant work experience and achievements.
description.motivateDescription: Encourage potential students to book a session with you.
description.headlineDescription: This will be displayed prominently on your profile.
description.headlinePlaceholder: E.g. Experienced software engineer helping you land your dream job

video.title: Video introduction
video.description: Add a horizontal video of up to 2 minutes
video.optional: Adding a video is optional but highly recommended to increase your booking rate. You can add it later from your profile settings.
video.instruction: Introduce yourself to students in the same language as your written description. If you teach a different language, include a short sample.
video.pasteLink: Or paste a link to your video
video.learnHow: Learn how to upload videos to
video.requirementsDescription: Make sure your video meets the requirements to get approved

availability.title: Availability
availability.timezoneDescription: A correct timezone is essential to coordinate lessons with international students
availability.availabilityDescription: Availability shows your potential working hours. Students can book lessons at these times.
availability.popularHoursTitle: Add popular hours to get more students
availability.popularHoursDescription: Most students book lessons between 6:00 and 9:00 (popular hours). Add time slots during these hours to triple your chances of getting booked.

pricing.title: Set your {duration} minute lesson price
pricing.commissionDescription: Our platform takes a small commission from each session to cover operational costs and continue improving the service. The exact commission rate will be displayed in your dashboard.

photoRequirements.centered: You should be centered and upright
photoRequirements.faceVisible: Your face and eyes should be visible (except for religious reasons)
photoRequirements.onlyPerson: You should be the only person in the photo
photoRequirements.colorPhoto: Use a color photo with high resolution and no filters

videoRequirementsDo.duration: Your video should be between 30 seconds and 2 minutes long
videoRequirementsDo.horizontal: Record in horizontal mode and at eye level
videoRequirementsDo.lighting: Use good lighting and a neutral background
videoRequirementsDo.stable: Use a stable surface so that your video does not appear shaky
videoRequirementsDo.faceVisible: Make sure your face and eyes are fully visible (except for religious reasons)
videoRequirementsDo.experience: Highlight your teaching experience and any relevant certifications
videoRequirementsDo.greet: Greet your students warmly and invite them to book a lesson

videoRequirementsDont.surname: Include your surname or any contact details
videoRequirementsDont.otherPeople: Have any other people visible in your video

hero.eyebrow: Career mentorship for your move abroad
hero.title: Find the mentor who can turn your overseas plans into a real next step.
hero.description: Bridgeee helps you connect with mentors who have already navigated job searches, language challenges, and relocation decisions, so you can move with more clarity and less guesswork.
hero.visualAlt: Illustration of a mentor session dashboard

highlights.firstSession: Start with one focused first session

match.title: Design mentor in Toronto
match.description: Aligned with your portfolio and relocation goals.

review.title: "I finally knew what to do next."
review.description: Resume, language study, and timing became much clearer.

availability.title: Evening sessions available
availability.description: Flexible times for English and Japanese learners.

problem.title: Before Bridgeee, most people piece together advice from scattered places.
problem.description: Generic blog posts, social media threads, and secondhand tips rarely match your target country, timeline, or confidence level. That makes the first step feel heavier than it should.

solution.title: Start with mentors who have already been through it.
solution.description: Browse mentors by background, compare the kind of support they offer, and book a first conversation when you are ready to turn uncertainty into a plan.

browse.title: Browse by goal
browse.description: Look for mentors who match the country, role, or transition you are aiming for.

compare.title: Compare fit quickly
compare.description: Review specialties, language support, and teaching style before you commit.

book.title: Book your first session
book.description: Use one conversation to clarify your next action, timeline, and blind spots.

noise.title: Advice is everywhere, but it rarely fits your exact situation.
noise.description: Hours disappear into forums, videos, and old articles without telling you what matters most for your move.

uncertainty.title: It is hard to know which step should come first.
uncertainty.description: Should you fix your resume, improve your language level, or prepare for interviews first? Unclear priorities slow everything down.

momentum.title: Finding someone with firsthand experience takes too long.
momentum.description: Even motivated people lose energy when they cannot quickly reach someone who understands the path they want to follow.

mentors.title: A few mentors you could start with.
mentors.description: Each profile brings a different lens on moving abroad, from portfolio feedback to interview preparation and settling into a new market.

aiko.name: Aiko Tanaka
aiko.summary: Supports creative professionals refining portfolios and job search stories for Europe.

marcus.name: Marcus Lee
marcus.summary: Helps applicants sharpen resumes, technical stories, and interview structure before applying abroad.

sofia.name: Sofia Ramirez
sofia.summary: Shares practical guidance on building confidence, networking, and settling into a new market.

shared.label: Bridgeee Legal
shared.draftNotice: This is a product-ready policy draft for Bridgeee and should be reviewed by your legal advisor before production launch.

terms.metaDescription: Read the rules for using Bridgeee.
terms.pageDescription: These terms explain how Bridgeee may be used by students, mentors, and other account holders.

paragraphs.1: Bridgeee connects students with mentors for informational mentoring, lesson scheduling, messaging, and payments.
paragraphs.2: By creating an account or using any part of Bridgeee, you agree to these Terms of Service.

paragraphs.1: You are responsible for keeping your account information accurate, current, and secure.
paragraphs.2: If you join as a mentor, you are also responsible for the accuracy of your profile, pricing, availability, and other information you publish on the platform.

bullets.1: Use your real identity and contact information.
bullets.2: Choose the correct role when signing up or using mentor features.
bullets.3: Do not create accounts for fraud, harassment, spam, or other abusive conduct.

paragraphs.1: Lessons are arranged through the booking and checkout tools provided by Bridgeee.
paragraphs.2: A booking is not fully confirmed until the applicable scheduling and payment steps shown in the product have been completed. Payment processing is handled by third-party providers, and any disputes or delays related to payments shall be governed by the terms of those providers.

bullets.1: Prices shown on the platform may change over time.
bullets.2: Payment processing may be handled by third-party providers such as Stripe.
bullets.3: Refunds, cancellations, and rescheduling are handled according to the published cancellation policy and any provider requirements.

paragraphs.1: Bridgeee may provide messaging, reviews, favorites, and related communication features to help mentors and students coordinate.
paragraphs.2: You are responsible for the content you send or publish and must not post illegal, misleading, abusive, infringing, or spam content.

bullets.1: Do not harass, threaten, exploit, or impersonate other users.
bullets.2: Do not submit fake reviews or misleading claims.
bullets.3: Do not attempt to bypass platform safeguards, payment flows, or abuse-detection systems.

paragraphs.1: Bridgeee provides software and coordination tools for informational mentoring and does not guarantee lesson quality, hiring outcomes, visa results, or any specific personal or business result.
paragraphs.2: Bridgeee is not a job placement or recruitment service and does not verify every statement made by users. Users shall use this service at their own risk and responsibility.

paragraphs.1: Bridgeee may suspend access or remove content when necessary to protect users, comply with law, or respond to safety, fraud, or policy concerns.
paragraphs.2: These terms may be updated from time to time, and continued use of the service after an update means you accept the revised version.

paragraphs.1: Bridgeee shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of this service, except in cases of willful misconduct or gross negligence.
paragraphs.2: If liability is recognized, the maximum liability shall be limited to the total amount paid by the user to Bridgeee.

paragraphs.1: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of Japan.
paragraphs.2: Any disputes arising in connection with this service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the court having jurisdiction over the location of the operator.

privacy.metaDescription: Learn how Bridgeee collects, uses, stores, and shares information.
privacy.pageDescription: This policy explains how Bridgeee handles personal information when people use the platform.

paragraphs.1: We collect information you provide directly, information created through your use of the service, and technical data needed to operate the platform.

bullets.1: Account details such as email address, role, profile photo, and login-related information.
bullets.2: Mentor profile information such as country, timezone, rates, availability, introduction, education, languages, and specialties.
bullets.3: Student and mentor activity such as favorites, messages, booking requests, bookings, reviews, and lesson history.
bullets.4: Payment-related records such as booking amounts, payout status, and payment provider identifiers.
bullets.5: Technical data such as session information, browser context, and service logs used for security and reliability.

paragraphs.1: We use personal information to operate, improve, secure, and support Bridgeee.

bullets.2: Display mentor listings and profile information.
bullets.3: Enable messaging, booking, scheduling, payments, reviews, and support.
bullets.4: Send transactional emails and service notifications.
bullets.5: Detect fraud, abuse, security issues, and policy violations.
bullets.6: Comply with legal, tax, accounting, and regulatory obligations.

paragraphs.1: We share information only when needed to run the platform, complete transactions, comply with law, or protect users and the service.

bullets.1: With other users where needed for the service experience, such as mentor profiles, booking details, reviews, and messages.
bullets.2: With service providers such as Supabase, Stripe, email providers, and meeting-link providers where applicable.
bullets.3: With regulators, law enforcement, courts, or advisors when required by law or necessary to protect rights, safety, or platform integrity.

paragraphs.1: We keep information for as long as needed to operate the service, resolve disputes, prevent abuse, enforce agreements, and meet legal or accounting obligations.
paragraphs.2: Different categories of information may be retained for different periods depending on their purpose and applicable legal requirements.

paragraphs.1: You may be able to update some profile information from your account settings and request support if you need corrections or account help.
paragraphs.2: Depending on where you live, you may have legal rights to access, correct, delete, or limit certain uses of your personal information.

paragraphs.1: We use reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational measures to protect information, but no online system can be guaranteed to be perfectly secure.
paragraphs.2: We may update this Privacy Policy over time, and the latest version will be posted on this page with a new effective date.

legal.metaDescription: Review the commercial disclosure notice for Bridgeee.
legal.pageDescription: This page provides the commercial disclosure information prepared for Bridgeee.

paragraphs.1: Business Name: Bridgeee
paragraphs.2: Operator Name: Disclosed without delay upon request
paragraphs.3: Address: Disclosed without delay upon request
paragraphs.5: Alternative Contact Method: Please contact us by email

paragraphs.1: The price of each mentoring session is shown on the relevant mentor profile and checkout screen before payment is completed.
paragraphs.2: Displayed prices may vary by mentor, duration, currency display, promotional settings, or later product updates.

paragraphs.1: Users are responsible for any internet connection charges, mobile carrier fees, bank charges, or similar costs required to access the service.
paragraphs.2: If third-party payment providers or card issuers apply separate fees, those fees are outside the direct control of Bridgeee.

paragraphs.1: Payment is collected through the checkout flow using the payment methods supported by the platform at that time.
paragraphs.2: A charge is initiated when the user completes the checkout flow and the payment provider confirms the transaction.

paragraphs.1: Access to the booked service is provided through the Bridgeee product after the relevant booking and payment steps are completed.
paragraphs.2: Session details, timing, and any meeting information are delivered through the user interface, related notifications, or connected service providers.

paragraphs.1: Cancellations, rescheduling, and refunds are handled according to the published cancellation policy and any requirements imposed by the payment provider.
paragraphs.2: Bridgeee should review and update this notice whenever commercial terms, operators, or payment practices materially change.

cancellation.metaDescription: Review Bridgeee's cancellation, rescheduling, and refund policy.
cancellation.pageDescription: This policy explains how Bridgeee handles cancellations, rescheduling requests, and refund decisions.

paragraphs.1: Bridgeee uses this policy to set user expectations around cancellations, rescheduling, missed sessions, and refund handling.
paragraphs.2: Specific outcomes may depend on the timing of the request, mentor availability, payment status, and any provider rules that apply to the transaction.

paragraphs.1: Students should review session details carefully before booking and contact the mentor promptly if a change is needed.
paragraphs.2: Bridgeee may take the timing of a cancellation request into account when deciding whether a reschedule or refund is appropriate.

bullets.1: Earlier requests are more likely to be handled through rescheduling where possible.
bullets.2: Last-minute cancellations may lead to limited refund options.
bullets.3: No-shows or repeated misuse of scheduling features may affect future access to the service.
bullets.4: Cancellations made at least 24 hours before the scheduled session may be eligible for a full refund.
bullets.5: Cancellations made within 24 hours may not be eligible for a refund.

paragraphs.1: Mentors are expected to keep availability accurate and communicate quickly if a session can no longer be delivered as booked.
paragraphs.2: If a mentor cancels or must reschedule, Bridgeee may support a new booking time or another appropriate resolution.

bullets.1: Mentors should provide as much advance notice as possible.
bullets.2: Repeated mentor-side cancellations may lead to account review or feature limits.
bullets.3: Users should confirm any updated booking details within the product before the new session time.

paragraphs.1: Refund decisions are evaluated case by case based on booking status, cancellation timing, platform records, and applicable payment-provider rules.
paragraphs.2: Where a refund is approved, the timing of the returned funds depends on the payment provider and the user's financial institution.

bullets.1: A completed charge does not automatically guarantee a refund.
bullets.2: Approved refunds may be partial or full depending on the circumstances.
bullets.3: Bridgeee may request supporting details when reviewing a dispute or refund request.

paragraphs.1: Bridgeee may make exceptions where needed to address fraud, technical issues, service errors, safety concerns, or legal obligations.
paragraphs.2: This policy may be updated from time to time, and the latest version posted on this page will apply going forward.
